sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: DDOG Q2 2025: 매출 28% 성장, S&P 500 편입 및 Gartner 옵저버빌리티 리더 5년 연속 달성

keyPoints.text: 2분기 매출은 8억 2,700만 달러로 전년 대비 28% 증가했으며, 100K달러 이상 ARR 고객이 약 3,850개로 전년(약 3,390개) 대비 확대됐다.
분기 중 S&P 500 지수에 편입됐으며, Gartner 옵저버빌리티 플랫폼 매직 쿼드런트에서 5년 연속 리더로 선정됐다.

businessChanges.text: Bits AI SRE, Bits AI Dev Agent, Bits AI Security Analyst 에이전트를 발표하며 자율 운영·개발·보안 영역에서 AI 에이전트 플랫폼을 본격화했다.
Archive Search·Flex Frozen·CloudPrem 등 로그 관리 신제품을 출시해 대용량·저비용 로그 스토리지 시장을 공략했다.

financialHighlights.text: non-GAAP 영업이익 1억 6,400만 달러(영업이익률 20%), 영업현금흐름 2억 달러, 프리캐시플로 1억 6,500만 달러를 기록했다.
현금 및 유가증권은 39억 달러 수준이며, GAAP EPS는 0.01달러로 손익분기점에 근접했다.

watchItems.text: S&P 500 편입 이후 기관 수요 변화와 AI 에이전트 제품군의 초기 매출 기여 여부가 하반기 성장 가속의 핵심 판단 기준이다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 ex-991x20250630x8k.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Datadog Announces Second Quarter 2025 Financial Results August 7, 2025 Second quarter revenue grew 28% year-over-year to $827 million Robust growth of larger customers, with about 3,850 $100k+ ARR customers, up from about 3,390 a year ago Unveiled more than 125 products, capabilities and features at DASH 2025 NEW YORK-- Datadog, Inc. (NASDAQ:DDOG), the monitoring and security platform for cloud applications, today announced financial results for its second quarter ended June 30, 2025. "Datadog had a strong second quarter, with 28% year-over-year revenue growth, $200 million in operating cash flow, and $165 million in free cash flow," said Olivier Pomel, co-founder and CEO of Datadog. Pomel added, "At  Normalized numeric aliases: $827 million = 8억 2,700만 달러; $200 million = 2억 달러; $165 million = 1억 6,500만 달러; $827 = 827달러; $100 = 100달러; $200 = 200달러; $165 = 165달러; 3,850 million = 38억 5,000만 달러; 3,390 million = 33억 9,000만 달러.

observe, secure, and act on their complex cloud environments and AI tech stacks." Second Quarter 2025 Financial Highlights: • Revenue was $827 million, an increase of 28% year-over-year. • GAAP operating loss was $(36) million; GAAP operating margin was (4)%. • Non-GAAP operating income was $164 million; non-GAAP operating margin was 20%. (1) • GAAP net income per diluted share was $0.01; non-GAAP net income per diluted share was $0.46. (1) • Operating cash flow was $200 million, with free cash flow of $165 million. • Cash, cash equivalents, and marketable securities were $3.9 billion as of June 30, 2025. Second Quarter & Recent Business Highlights: • As  Normalized numeric aliases: $827 million = 8억 2,700만 달러; $164 million = 1억 6,400만 달러; $200 million = 2억 달러; $165 million = 1억 6,500만 달러; $3.9 billion = 39억 달러; $827 = 827달러; $164 = 164달러; $0.01 = 0.01달러; $200 = 200달러; 3,390 million = 33억 9,000만 달러; $165 = 165달러; $3.9 = 3.9달러; 3,850 million = 38억 5,000만 달러; 100,000 million = 1,000억 달러.

Region, adding to existing locations in North America, Asia, and Europe. 1) The three months ended June 30, 2025 are adjusted for M&A transaction costs of $1.4 million, and these adjustments are applied prospectively, as these costs were not material to the consolidated results of operations in the prior periods. • Named a Leader in the Gartner Magic Quadrant for Observability Platforms, 2025 . This is the fifth consecutive year Gartner has positioned Datadog as a Leader in the Magic Quadrant. • Joined the S&P 500 Index. The S&P 500 is widely regarded as the best single gauge of large-cap U.S. equities, tracking the stock performance of 500 leading US companies. • Announced Datadog has ranked on the Forbes Global 2000 and Forbes Global 2000 United States Lists for 2025. Datadog's addition recognizes the company's global impact and financial strength. • Introduced three new AI agents,  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.4 million = 140만 달러; $1.4 = 1.4달러.

Bits AI SRE, Bits AI Dev Agent and Bits AI Security Analyst agent, which perform interactive investigations and asynchronous code fixes for operations, development and security teams. • Announced Archive Search, Flex Frozen, and CloudPrem in the log management suite, which are designed to help organizations optimize logging costs at scale and meet the stringent data retention, auditability, and data residency requirements of regulated industries. • Launched the Internal Developer Portal, the first and only developer portal built on live observability data. • Announced Code Security, Bits AI Security Analyst, and Workload Protection, to detect and remediate critical security risks across customers’ AI environments — from development to production — as Datadog further invests to secure its customers’ cloud and AI applications. • Announced AI Agent Monitoring, LLM Experiments, and AI Agents
